title: Reading Method
author: Wood, Joanne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Developed by Francis Robinson in the 1940s, the SQ3R (survey, question, read, recite, review) method not only helps to keep you active in your reading, it is very effective for reading comprehension. It is a helpful technique for both understanding and remembering the material you are reading. It is set up into five simple steps, which will be discussed below. 
 This document is added for archiving purposes. For more information visit  www.aiu.edu.sy
